scripts.db:migrate: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml exec -T api-gateway pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:deploy: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml exec -T api-gateway pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:seed: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml exec -T api-gateway node packages/db/scripts/seed.mjs
scripts.db:verify-seed: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml exec -T api-gateway node packages/db/scripts/verify-seed.mjs
